question: Design a `Printer` class with an overloaded public method `print`. This method should be able to print: 1) an integer, 2) a double, and 3) a C-style string (`const char*`). Demonstrate printing different data types using the same method name.

test_cases.input: No direct input, uses hardcoded calls.
test_cases.expected:
--- Testing Correct Version ---
Printing an integer: 123456
Printing a double: 789.01234
Printing a C-style string: This is a C-style string.
Printing a C-style string: (null)
Printing a C-style string: 
Printing an integer: 0
Printing a double: -1.23
--- End Correct Version Test ---
